weapon.KHRAVENGGER.skill.DETONATE_BONECH.text: Skill DMG Dealt +{dmg_up:0.0%} (for every skill). When the wielder's battle skill applies Cryo Infliction, the wielder gains Cryo DMG Dealt +{cryst_dmg_up:0.0%} for {duration:0}s. When the wielder deals combo skill DMG to an enemy with Cryo Infliction, the wielder gains Cryo DMG Dealt +{cryst_dmg_up2:0.0%} for {duration2:0}s. The two effects apply separately and do not stack with themselves.

weapon.KHRAVENGGER.status.KHRAVENGGER_BO.text: Cryo DMG Dealt bonus from battle skill Cryo Infliction
Cryo DMG Dealt bonus from combo skill vs Cryo Infliction enemy
